title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: "Update All" button shows single unified DFU progress bar for both earbuds and charging case instead of separate device updates
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (earbuds + charging case)
Wait for the app to detect available firmware updates for both earbuds and charging case
Tap the 'Update All' button on the Home screen or Device Settings screen
Observe the firmware update progress UI
expected: The "Update All" button should trigger separate DFU processes for each device (left earbud, right earbud, charging case), each with its own progress bar showing individual update status from 0% to 100%.
